title: B2 · Intermedio alto
subtitle: Abstract ideas, opinions, discussions, idiomatic phrases.
focus: First upper-intermediate group: nuance, opinion verbs, common idiomatic phrases for discussion.

groups.title: Matices · Nuance and opinion
groups.focus: Abstract nouns, opinion verbs, subjunctive triggers, and idiomatic phrases.

groups.title: Sociedad actual · Environment, rights and public life
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for social issues, environment, economy, rights, politics, culture and argumentation.

groups.title: Argumentar · Debate, nuance and evidence
groups.focus: B2 argumentation vocabulary for essays, oral debates, evidence, nuance, priorities and balanced opinions.

groups.title: Medio ambiente y tecnología · Climate, resources and digital life
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for environment, sustainability, energy, digital life, privacy and technological change.

groups.title: Educación y vida pública · Culture, politics and social change
groups.focus: B2 vocabulary for education, culture, rights, democratic life, migration, equality and public policy.

groups.title: Argumentación avanzada · Evidence, nuance and conditions
groups.focus: B2 chunks for nuanced argumentation, evidence, conditions, concessions and balanced conclusions.

groups.title: Economía y sociedad · Public policy and social issues
groups.focus: B2 chunks for economy, housing, healthcare, equality, labour and public measures.

groups.title: Cultura y educación · Identity, rights and social change
groups.focus: B2 chunks for culture, education, identity, equality, discrimination and democratic participation.

groups.title: Debate y análisis · Data, objections and concessions
groups.focus: B2 chunks for analysis, debate, evidence, counterarguments and concession clauses.

groups.title: Retos actuales · Policy, climate and social change
groups.focus: B2 chunks for public policy, social challenges, climate, labour, health and nuanced argument.
